children.heading: Cultural competency, prevention, and public health and individuals with disability grants
children.label: a Cultural competency, prevention, and public health and individuals with disability grants
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Administrator of the Health Resources and Services Administration, may make awards of grants, contracts, or cooperative agreements to eligible entities for the development, evaluation, and dissemination of research, demonstration projects, and model curricula for cultural competency, prevention, public health proficiency, reducing health disparities, and aptitude for working with individuals with disabilities training for use in health professions schools and continuing education programs, and for other purposes determined as appropriate by the Secretary. Grants under this section shall be the same as provided in .section 293e of this title

children.heading: Collaboration
children.label: b Collaboration
children.text: In carrying out subsection (a), the Secretary shall collaborate with the entities described in . The Secretary shall coordinate with curricula and research and demonstration projects developed under such section 293e.section 293e(b) of this title

children.heading: Dissemination
children.label: c Dissemination
children.text: Model curricula developed under this section shall be disseminated and evaluated in the same manner as model curricula developed under , as described in subsection (c) of such section.section 293e of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are to be appropriated to carry out this section such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2010 through 2015.
